_comment: Mutation survivors accepted as a baseline for the core crate. The nightly ratchet fails when a survivor appears outside this set. Regenerate with `python scripts/mutation_gate.py --update` after a sweep, and only ever let this set shrink. Entries are the survivor line without its line:col position, so they survive unrelated code motion.
survivors: crates/valgebra-core/src/decision.rs: delete match arm Schema::Set(_) | Schema::FrozenSet(_) in Schema::empty_and_region
